_comment: Response-shape snapshot for FinnGen sync endpoints. Values map each endpoint function to the top-level keys its response list is contracted to emit. Drift test (test-finngen-shape-drift.R) asserts the actual function output matches these keys — catching upstream breaking changes before they reach Laravel. Update this file deliberately via PR when the API contract changes.

finngen_romopapi_code_counts.notes: Requires ROMOPAPI::createCodeCountsTables() to have materialized the stratified_code_counts table in the results schema. SP2 Code Explorer will invoke this setup lazily.

finngen_romopapi_relationships.notes: Direct SQL over vocab.concept_relationship. Works against vocab-only seed.

finngen_romopapi_ancestors.notes: Direct SQL over vocab.concept_ancestor. Mermaid string starts with 'graph TD'.

finngen_hades_counts.notes: Direct SQL over {cohort_schema}.cohort. counts is a data.frame with COHORT_ID, SUBJECTS, ENTRIES.

finngen_hades_overlap.notes: Square matrix (length(cohort_ids) x length(cohort_ids)). Diagonal = total subjects per cohort. Off-diagonal = shared subjects.
